div.head: The Minister in Honduras (Morales) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 25. Your February 6, 5 p.m. President Baraona showed me signed letter. It authorizes Luis Bográn: (1) to state that the Government of Honduras undertakes to organize constabulary and to employ American instructors and (2) to contract for the purchase of arms. I am forwarding a copy of this letter by pouch.Letter to Bográn not printed; it is dated February 13.

Several legal experts, including government officials, whom I consulted, agree that President Baraona’s authorization to Luis Bográn to contract is sufficient to bind Government of Honduras respecting the
consular revenues without the approval of the Honduran Congress. This opinion has been confirmed by President Baraona.
